title: 100PCS Christmas Label Gift Tags, LEUOSO 300gsm Kraft Present Hanging Label Card, 10 Pattern Styles with 10M Cotton String and Twine String for Xmas Paper Wrapping Decorations, DIY Homemade Arts Craft
features: Material: Christmas kraft tag is made of high quality kraft card paper, bring you a retro style, Gift giving, gift box of the best accessories.

Classic Christmas Patterns: New upgraded design, Xmas tags is printed with 10 christmas element patterns,like snowman, christmas tree, reindeer etc. And the back is blank. You can also write other blessings or names on the back of tags.

Suitable DIY Homemade Craft: You can use these craft tags to print your designs onto these tags to personalise your tags. and all the people on your gift list will be super impressed with the results!

What You Get: 100PCS christmas gift tags with 2 roll ropes, 1 roll of 10m red cotton string, 1 roll of 10m natural twine string, You can cut the string into the any length you want, enough for for this christmas useage.
Perfect Christmas Decorations: Christmas Gift Tags Gift Wrapping can be used to hang on Christmas tree, hang on compatible twine and rope and also especially classic DIY Craft for gift wrapping.
description: Product Description Christmas Gift Tags 100PCS Christmas Presents Tags, Xmas Present Labels 10 Styles with Cotton String and Twine String, Xmas Wrapping Accessories for Gifts Present Decor Christmas present labels have 10 different classic and popular Christmas theme design, include christmas tree,reindeer,socks, snowman,ect. The size of tags is 7.5cm x 5cm, perfect for adding a handmade touch to your Christmas gifts. DIY Homemade Craft: You can write your name on the back and use these craft tags to print your designs onto these tags to personalise your tags.
